ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bus_stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus stop */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the bus stop */,
  "state" INTEGER /* State where the bus stop is located */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the bus stop was installed */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the bus stop */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the bus stop */,
  "stop_type" TEXT /* Type of bus stop (e.g., sheltered, uncovered) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available at the bus stop (e.g., benches, shelters, lighting) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the bus stop can accommodate */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak hours for the bus stop */,
  "non_peak_hours" TEXT /* Non-peak hours for the bus stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_stops_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wait_time_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of wait time data */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus stop */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples taken for the wait time data */,
  "max_time" REAL /* Maximum wait time in seconds */,
  "min_time" REAL /* Minimum wait time in seconds */,
  "mean_time" REAL /* Mean wait time in seconds */,
  "median_time" REAL /* Median wait time in seconds */,
  "std_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of wait times in seconds */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the wait time data was collected */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week when the data was collected */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month when the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the data was collected */,
  "hour_of_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the data was collected */,
  "is_peak_hour" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the data was collected during peak hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wait_time_data_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the state is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installation_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installation record */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus stop */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the bus stop was installed */,
  "installer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the installer */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the installation */,
  "installation_type" TEXT /* Type of installation (e.g., new, repair) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the installation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installation_records_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installation_records_installer_id FOREIGN KEY ("installer_id") REFERENCES installers ("installer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installers" (
  "installer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installer */,
  "installer_name" TEXT /* Name of the installer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the installer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the installer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the installer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the installer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("installer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus stop */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the passenger */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the feedback is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_feedback_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger count record */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus stop */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the passenger count */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the passenger count */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers at the bus stop */,
  "is_peak_hour" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the count was taken during peak hours */,
  "is_weekend" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the count was taken on a weekend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_counts_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus schedule */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus stop */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus serving the stop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time at the bus stop */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time from the bus stop */,
  "is_delayed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the bus is delayed */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time at the bus stop */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time from the bus stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_schedules_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_schedules_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buses" (
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus */,
  "bus_number" TEXT /* Bus number */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the bus */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bus (e.g., In Service, Out of Service) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bus */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the bus was manufactured */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the driver started working */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the driver's license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route assignment */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was made */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the assignment is currently active */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_assignments_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_assignments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_assignments_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "start_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first stop on the route */,
  "end_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last stop on the route */,
  "total_stops" INTEGER /* Total number of stops on the route */,
  "route_length" REAL /* Length of the route in kilometers */,
  "average_travel_time" INTEGER /* Average travel time for the route in minutes */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of buses on the route (e.g., every 10 minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)
